acceptance_criteria.criterion: Maps all 8 research insights to implementation evidence
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Section A contains 8 rows mapping insights 1-8 with artifact references and status

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Maps all 15 gap review behaviors to enforcement mechanism status
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Section B contains 15 rows mapping behaviors 1-15 with enforcement mechanisms

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Maps PLAN.md phases 1-6 to implementation coverage
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Section C maps all 6 phases with percent-complete and per-spec breakdowns, includes revised assessment

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Each row includes planned item, artifact(s), and status
acceptance_criteria.evidence: All three tables follow pattern: planned item + artifact path(s) + status tag (Implemented/Partial/Absent)

dimensions.name: coverage
dimensions.evidence: All 8 insights, 15 behaviors, 6 phases mapped. Section D identifies 11 additional architectural gaps

dimensions.name: depth
dimensions.evidence: Revised Phase 2-3 assessment demonstrates genuine depth — caught own initial overestimation and corrected with evidence

dimensions.name: sources
dimensions.evidence: Claims reference specific artifact paths. Minor imprecision: '8 dimension YAMLs' (actually 7), '80+ components' (actually 122)

dimensions.name: synthesis
dimensions.evidence: Section summaries synthesize patterns: '5/8 fully implemented, 3/8 partial. The partials cluster around eval automation and runtime enforcement'

dimensions.name: actionability
dimensions.evidence: Each Partial/Absent status directly informs fixes. Section D gap table includes severity ratings feeding into recommendations
